L1.head: GPCRs
L1.claim: GPCRs具有内在动态呼吸运动

L1.head: membrane lipid environment
L1.claim: 膜脂环境调控动态呼吸运动的时空波动

L1.head: spatiotemporal fluctuations
L1.tail: transient exposure of allosteric sites and lateral ligand entrance pathways
L1.claim: 时空波动决定了变构位点和侧向配体通路的瞬时暴露

L1.head: dynamic states
L1.tail: regulatory checkpoints for receptor activation and signal transduction
L1.claim: 这些动态状态作为受体激活和信号转导的调控检查点

L1.head: regulatory checkpoints
L1.tail: new opportunities for targeted drug design
L1.claim: 揭示了通过同步脂质相互作用和构象变化的药物设计新机会

L2.head: specific transient breathing motions in GPCRs
L2.tail: key steps in the receptor's signaling cycle
L2.claim: 特定的瞬时呼吸运动与信号周期的关键步骤一致

L2.head: distinct conformational intermediates
L2.claim: 不同的构象中间体作为促进或抑制下游信号的关键开关

L2.head: targeted stabilization or disruption of these states
L2.claim: 靶向稳定或破坏这些状态可以调节受体功能

L2.head: local lipid milieu
L2.tail: conformation of GPCR allosteric binding sites
L2.claim: 局部脂质环境协调变构结合位点的构象变化

L2.head: lipid-mediated modulation
L2.claim: 脂质介导的调控影响受体信号传导

L2.head: lipid-mediated modulation
L2.claim: 该调控提供了侧向配体进入的门控通道

L2.head: natural interplay between membrane lipids and receptor dynamics
L2.tail: innovative avenues for designing allosteric drugs
L2.claim: 膜脂与受体动态的自然相互作用为设计变构药物提供了新途径
